src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added 'scp' as a new supported endpoint type to the enumeration.
Removed the deprecated Eureka client annotation to align with modern Spring Cloud versions that no longer bundle Netflix Eureka by default.
Explicitly enabled the generic Spring Cloud Discovery Client to replace the specific Eureka client functionality.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Added @EnableDiscoveryClient annotation to the main application class

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Enabled Spring's task scheduling support, likely required for new background tasks or metrics collection in the updated service.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Added @EnableScheduling annotation to the main application class

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Replace complex, commented-out legacy Spring Batch configuration with a minimal setup using DefaultBatchConfiguration and a synchronous JobLauncher.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Removed commented-out JobRepositoryFactoryBean and CustomReader logic; added simple JobLauncher bean using SyncTaskExecutor.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Introduce a new bean to hold a set of job IDs, likely for tracking or state management in the new version.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Added @Bean public Set<Long> jobIds() { return new HashSet<>(); }

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added import for java.time.Duration to support new throughput calculation logic.
Removed unused URI scheme constants and legacy identifiers that are no longer needed in the refactored codebase.
Removed unused file metadata and account ID constants.
Added new constants for source and destination host/port separation.
Added new constants for file counting and credential types.
Corrected the FIVE_MB constant to use proper binary calculation (5 * 1024 * 1024) instead of an approximate decimal value.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl:
- public static final int FIVE_MB = 5000000;
+ public static final int FIVE_MB = 5 * 1024 * 1024;

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Removed the TRANSFER_SLICE_SIZE constant which is no longer used.
Added new size constants for chunking and Google Drive minimums.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl:
+ public static final int TWENTY_MB = 20 * 1024 * 1024;
+ public static final int GOOGLE_DRIVE_MIN_BYTES = 262144;

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added HTTP header and range constants for resumable uploads and CORS support.
Added SCP command string constants for remote file operations.
Added job and file size metric constants.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl:
+ public static final String JOB_SIZE = "jobSize";
+ public static final String FILE_SIZE_AVG = "fileSizeAvg";

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added HTTP compression and encoding constants.
Added concurrency, parallelism, and optimization configuration constants.
Added application name and thread pool prefix constants.
Added a utility method to compute throughput in megabits per second using Duration.
Replaced Gson with Jackson ObjectMapper for JSON serialization and deserialization.
Replaced field-based @Autowired injection with constructor-based dependency injection.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: public RabbitMQConsumer(VfsExpander vfsExpander, Queue userQueue, ...) { this.vfsExpander = vfsExpander; ... }

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added support for expanding VFS directory endpoints before processing transfer jobs.
Added dynamic thread pool optimization based on incoming TransferApplicationParams messages.
Refactored message consumption to handle both TransferJobRequest and TransferApplicationParams types.
Removed direct database CRUD service calls from the consumer, likely moving persistence logic elsewhere.
Simplified job launching by removing explicit chunk size setting and using standard JobLauncher.
Improved logging by replacing System.out.println with SLF4J logger calls.
Added job ID tracking to a set for monitoring or lifecycle management.
Replace direct CrudService dependency with VfsExpander to handle directory expansion logic.
Rename asyncJobLauncher to jobLauncher for clearer naming conventions.
Add logic to expand VFS directories into file lists before processing the transfer request.
Remove verbose and potentially sensitive debug logging statements.
Update job launch mechanism to capture and return the specific JobExecution ID.
Add a Set to track active job IDs within the controller instance.
Replaced PriorityQueue with ConcurrentLinkedQueue to support thread-safe concurrent access patterns.
Added SHA-256 message digest calculation during stream condensation to generate a hash of the combined data.
Added SLF4J logger to track chunk processing and output the final hash value.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(...); logger.info("Processing chunk {}", currentChunk);

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Sorted the chunks using the original comparator before processing to maintain order despite using a non-sorted queue.
Added a public clear method to explicitly reset the internal queue state.
Removed imports for classes no longer used in the file, such as ByteBuf and javassist.
Swapped the types of chunkIdx and startPosition to use int for the index and long for the position, likely to optimize memory usage or align with API expectations.
src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.human_impl: Changed 'long chunkIdx' to 'int chunkIdx' and 'int startPosition' to 'long startPosition'.

src/main/java/org/onedatashare/transfers.general_idea: Added @ToString.Exclude to the data field to prevent large byte arrays from being included in the generated toString output.
Add a chunkSize field to the EntityInfo model to support chunked data handling.
Changed the type of the 'size' field from long to int to reduce memory footprint or align with API constraints.
Added a boolean flag 'isLastChunk' to track if the current part is the final segment of a file.
Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
Remove the unused lombok.NonNull import to clean up the codebase.
Removed the @Builder annotation to simplify object construction or resolve conflicts with other annotations.
Added @NoArgsConstructor to ensure the class can be instantiated without arguments, likely for deserialization or framework compatibility.
Removed the jobId field from the request model, possibly moving its generation or handling to a different layer.
Removed the priority field from the request model.
Renamed chunkSize to connectionBufferSize to better reflect its purpose or align with new naming conventions.
Added a credId field to the Destination inner class to store credential identifiers.
Replaced the parentInfo EntityInfo field with a simple String fileDestinationPath in the Destination class.
Added a credId field to the Source inner class to store credential identifiers.
Replaced the parentInfo EntityInfo field with a simple String fileSourcePath in the Source class.
